title: centaurea × kovacsii
intro: Centaurea × kovacsii, also known as Kovats' cornflower or Scabiosa × kovatsii, is a hybrid flower in the borage family, resulting from the cross between Scabiosa and Centaurea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are believed to aid in wound healing and the treatment of skin conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea × kovacsii are attributed to its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote tissue repair, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin care. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × kovacsii typically involve infusing the dried flowers in water or oil to create a topical treatment for skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
